ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library used for the algorithm (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that uses this hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, int) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., training loss, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this log belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance value */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate value */,
  "train_loss_CV" REAL /* Training loss CV value */,
  "train_loss_SN" REAL /* Training loss SN value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this log belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance value */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate value */,
  "validation_loss_CV" REAL /* Validation loss CV value */,
  "validation_loss_SN" REAL /* Validation loss SN value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this log belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance value */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate value */,
  "test_loss_CV" REAL /* Test loss CV value */,
  "test_loss_SN" REAL /* Test loss SN value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this evaluation belongs to */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this history belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hyperparameter that this history belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_history_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that this collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the collaborator was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborators_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that this collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the collaborator was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_collaborators_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm that this collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the collaborator was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_collaborators_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
